## Progress Tracking

Update `progress.md` in the plan directory after each step:
```
context/plans/active/[plan-name]/progress.md
```

Format:
```markdown
## Progress
| Step | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| 1 | done | [key files changed] |
| 2 | in-progress | [blockers if any] |

## Decision Changes
- DC-001: [What changed and why]
```
